title: 10 Inch Metallic Balloons Shiny Balloons Birthday Party Latex Balloons for Wedding Baby Shower Decorations Orange Color Pack of 50
features: Premium Balloons: These 10” Metallic Shiny balloons are made of premium quality natural latex. These are thus durable, beautiful and also completely safe for children. These balloons are shiny with jewel tone colours, which makes the party interesting and unforgettable
Size: These balloons when inflated measure 10 inches and have thick walls which make them last the longest. So your party looks young, bright and magnificent till the end

Wide Applications: These balloons come in multiple colors and these colors easily match themes for any kind of parties. Be it a birthday, wedding anniversary, engagement, corporate event, graduation party or maybe a romantic date for your beloved. These balloons are just perfect for all your party decoration needs

Safety and Usage: Please DO NOT inflate the balloons over 90% to prevent popping and avoid overheating or excessive friction. It is highly recommended to use pump inflation. These balloons are environment friendly and are also safe around children

Packaging: Our party balloons bulk set includes 25/50/100 Pcs 10-inch Metallic Chrome Blue latex balloons. 50 balloons are enough to make a beautiful balloon arch, balloon column, or multiple balloon bouquets and table centerpieces and any parties events. (Not includes arch kit or balloon column stand). We always send few extra balloons if some other balloons have hole or damage. For any queries, do not hesitate to contact us
description: These shiny metallic balloons look great in any party theme. These measure 10 Inches after inflation and weight approximately 2.8 grams. Do not overfill the balloon and avoid sunburn, overheating, sharp objects and excessive friction. Strong winds or shots may cause a burst
